---
title: "Books to learn about ubuntu 11.1"
date: 2011-10-17
forum: New to Ubuntu
---

### Post by rishi_singh on 2011-10-17
Just wanted a list of good books/tutorials for beginners to learn how the os is designed, how it works, how to use it and master it. Please suggest some.

---

### Post by rburkartjo on 2011-10-17
ris this link will give up some insight

[http://www.addictivetips.com/ubuntu-linux-tips/the-complete-guide-to-ubuntu-11-10-oneiric-ocelot-review/](http://www.addictivetips.com/ubuntu-linux-tips/the-complete-guide-to-ubuntu-11-10-oneiric-ocelot-review/)

---

### Post by rburkartjo on 2011-10-17
this link even better 4 pages lots of good info

[http://www.howtoforge.com/the-perfect-desktop-ubuntu-11.10-oneiric-ocelot](http://www.howtoforge.com/the-perfect-desktop-ubuntu-11.10-oneiric-ocelot)

---

### Post by BlinkinCat on 2011-10-17
If you are looking at purchasing a book I can recommend the Beginning Ubuntu Linux series available from Amazon -
[http://www.amazon.com/Beginning-Ubuntu-Linux-Natty-Narwhal/dp/1430236264/ref=sr_1_1?s=books&ie=UTF8&qid=1318864560&sr=1-1](http://www.amazon.com/Beginning-Ubuntu-Linux-Natty-Narwhal/dp/1430236264/ref=sr_1_1?s=books&ie=UTF8&qid=1318864560&sr=1-1)

This is the Natty Narwhal version - I purchased the version before this one and found it to be very enlightening. Later additions will be available for different versions over coming months.

Cheers - :)

---

Thanks to all for the recommendations. Please tell me if the 11.04 book can be used for 11.1 or not.
